summary: Comprehensive testing of Supplier Management Module. All features working: 5 role demo buttons on login page, Supplier login/dashboard with PO management, Brand dashboard with supplier directory and PO creation, Admin dashboard with supplier statistics, Registration page with Supplier role option. Fixed API trailing slash issue that caused 404 errors on frontend.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed API trailing slash issue - FastAPI routes require trailing slashes due to redirect_slashes=False setting
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Role-based access control working correctly (Brand creates POs, Supplier accepts/rejects)
Toast notifications provide good user feedback on actions
seed_data_creation: 1 supplier (Test Supplier Co) and multiple POs already exist in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Management Module fully functional. Brand can see supplier directory and create POs. Supplier can view and accept/reject POs. Admin sees supplier stats. All 5 roles available for login and registration. Note: Frontend API calls in /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js use trailing slashes for suppliers and purchase-orders endpoints due to FastAPI configuration.

login_page_5_roles.notes: Demo credential buttons visible for Admin, Manufacturer, Brand, Auditor, Supplier

features: PO creation dialog with all fields

brand_creates_po.notes: Created PO via dialog - product name, quantity, price, delivery date, address. Total amount auto-calculated. Success toast shown.

features: Orders Awaiting Acceptance section with Accept/Reject buttons

supplier_accepts_po.notes: Accept button works, status changes to 'accepted', pending count decreases

features: Supplier Overview section with Total Suppliers, Avg Compliance, Risk Distribution

registration_supplier_role.notes: Supplier role visible in dropdown with description 'Manage orders, track deliveries'

api_tested.GET /api/suppliers/: Working - returns supplier list for brands/admins
api_tested.GET /api/purchase-orders/: Working - returns POs based on user role
api_tested.POST /api/purchase-orders/{id}/reject: Working - suppliers can reject POs (not UI tested)

bug_fixed.issue: Frontend API calls returning 404 for suppliers and purchase-orders endpoints
bug_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI configured with redirect_slashes=False requiring trailing slashes on collection routes
bug_fixed.fix: Added trailing slashes to frontend API calls in /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js for getAll() and create() methods
